name_en: Original 5NE851, MiuM Small Round Tote, made of vintage-worn soft calfskin, soft texture, comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, the real thing has amazing texture, cylindrical structure with a great design, small and exquisite, chic and cute, full of girlish vibes, ample capacity, crossbody is simple and convenient
name_cn:
Original 5NE851, MiuM Small Round Tote, made of vintage-worn soft calfskin, soft texture, comes with an adjustable shoulder strap, the real thing has amazing texture, cylindrical structure with a great design, small and exquisite, chic and cute, full of girlish vibes, ample capacity, crossbody is simple and convenient
Size: 22 X 9 X 9 cm
